post.description: Search cartographic transform records (any sub-type) by keywords and/or geographic area. Geographical constraints are passed (optionally) as parameters via the query URL, search keywords are passed via the request body. Query syntax follows Lucene style, default operator for multiple expressions is AND. The following keywords are supported: ''name:'',''description:'', ''type:'', ''authority:'', ''code:'', ''deprecationState:'', ''remarks:'', ''lastModified:'', ''source:'', ''wellKnownText:'', ''fromCRS.authority:'', ''fromCRS.code:'', ''toCRS.authority:'', toCRS.code:'', ''policy:''. followed by a value. Example: ''fromCRS.code:4267''.

409.description: A LegalTag with the given name already exists.

403.description: User not authorized to perform the action.

post.description: Search CRS records (any sub-type) by keywords and/or geographic area. Geographical constraints are passed (optionally) as parameters via the query URL, search keywords are passed via the request body. Query syntax follows Lucene style, default operator for multiple expressions is AND. The following keywords are supported: ''name:'', ''description:'', ''type:'', ''authority:'', ''code:'', ''deprecationState:'', ''remarks:'', ''lastModified:'', ''source:'', ''wellKnownText:'', ''crsType:'', ''baseCRS.authority:'', ''baseCRS.code:'', ''horizontalCRS.authority:'', ''horizontalCRS.code:'', ''verticalCRS.authority:'', ''verticalCRS.code:'', ''lateBoundCRS.authority:'', ''lateBoundCRS.code:'', ''ct.authority:'', ''ct.code:'', ''transformationReady:''. followed by a value. Example: ''transformationReady:true''.

409.description: A LegalTag with the given name already exists.

403.description: User not authorized to perform the action.

post.description: Search Area of Use records by keywords and/or geographic area - returning named bounding box definitions in latitude and longitude. Geographical constraints are passed (optionally) as parameters via the query URL, search keywords are passed via the request body. Query syntax follows Lucene style, default operator for multiple expressions is AND. The following keywords are supported: ''name:'', ''description:'', ''authority:'', ''code:'', ''deprecationState:'', ''remarks:'' (deprecationState remarks), ''lastModified:''. Example ''name:*America*''.

recordId.description: Record of CRS or CT to check points against

dataId.description: Searches on id for CRS records

points.description: List of points to check against CRS or CT bounding boxes

offset.description: Corresponds to offset on search service

limit.description: Corresponds to limit on search service. Default is to return all found entities.

index.description: A zero-based index of the point in the input "points" array

approximateKmDistanceOutside.description: Kilometers outside the record's bounding box

PointsInAouSearchPoint.description: A point that didn't land in the bounding box for area of use search

bboxFailedPoints.description: A point that didn't land in the bounding box for area of use search

maxDistKmOutsideBBox.description: Point distance with highest km outside bounding box

PointsInAouSearchResult.description: List of failed points, ones that aren't in bounding box

codeSpace.description: Corresponds to CodeSpace field on CT records

name.description: Corresponds to Name field on CT records. All entities with name containing the search string will be returned. Wildcard is not supported

id.description: Corresponds to ID field on CT records

code.description: Corresponds to Code field on CT records

kind.description: Corresponds to the Kind field on CT records. Default is to not return CT records with Kind "VerticalTransformation". Viable options include "Transformation", "ConcatenatedOperation", "VerticalTransformation", "ExcludeVertical" (default) and "All". "All" is a special value which indicates returning records of all kinds.

sourceCRS.description: Corresponds to SourceCRS.SourceCRSID (record id), e.g., "osdu:reference-data--CoordinateReferenceSystem:Geographic2D:EPSG::4198:". As SourceCRS and TargetCRS are interchangeable, it will also search TargetCRS.TargetCRSID

targetCRS.description: Corresponds to TargetCRS.TargetCRSID (record id), e.g., "osdu:reference-data--CoordinateReferenceSystem:Geographic2D:EPSG::4198:". As SourceCRS and TargetCRS are interchangeable, it will also search SourceCRS.SourceCRSID

latitude.description: Returns all entities for which the (Latitude, Longitude) is inside the Extent bounding box. Must also provide longitude

includeDeprecated.description: Whether to return deprecated records marked with InactiveIndicator=true. Default is false.

offset.description: Corresponds to offset on search service

limit.description: Corresponds to limit on search service. Default is to return all found entities.

returnAllFields.description: Whether to return all fields in the record. Default is false and only a subset is returned

query.description: Query string used against Search service

codeSpace.description: Corresponds to CodeSpace field on CRS records

code.description: Corresponds to Code field on CRS records

name.description: Corresponds to Code field on CRS records

id.description: Corresponds to ID field on CRS records

kind.description: Corresponds to Kind field on CRS records

coordinateReferenceSystemType.description: Type of CRS, e.g., BoundCRS, ProjectedCRS, GeodeticCRS, VerticalCRS

returnBoundProjectedAndProjectedBasedOnW.description: Whether or not to only return bound projected type or projected type based on wgs84. If true, it only returns CRS 1. with Kind as "BoundProjected" or 2. with Kind as "projected" and BaseCRS.AuthorityCode.Code as 4326

returnBoundGeographic2DAndWgs84.description: Whether or not to only return bound geopraphic 2d type. If true, it only returns CRS 1. with Kind as "BoundGeographic2D" or 2. with Kind as "geographic 2D" and Code as 4326 and CodeSpace as "EPSG"

extent.description: Description of extent. Corresponds to PreferredUsage.Extent.Description in the record. All entities with PreferredUsage.Extent.Description containing the search string will be returned. Wildcard is not supported.

horizontalAxisUnitId.description: Corresponds to CoordinateSystem.HorizontalAxisUnitID field on CRS records, e.g., "osdu:reference-data--UnitOfMeasure:dega:".

verticalAxisUnitId.description: CorrespondsCorresponds to CoordinateSystem.VerticalAxisUnitID field on CRS records

latitude.description: Latitude point for searching on CRS bounding box

longitude.description: Longitude point for searching on CRS bounding box

includeDeprecated.description: Whether to return deprecated records marked with InactiveIndicator=true. Default is false

offset.description: Corresponds to offset on search service

limit.description: Corresponds to limit on search service. Default is to return all found entities.

returnAllFields.description: Whether to return all fields in the record. Default is false and only a subset is returned

returnedFields.description: Return all fields in the record

items.description: Return all fields in the record

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the SingleCT serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1).

SingleCTRequest.description: Request to get one SingleCT given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence.

persistableReference.description: The item 'essence' serialized into a JSON string..

NamedReference.description: Name and Persistable Reference (the essence converted to a JSON string).

query.description: The Lucene style query string with keywords.

SearchRequest.description: Request to containing a Lucene style query string.

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

CTResults.description: A response containing a list of cartographic transformations

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

crses.description: A response containing a list of CRSes.

CRSResults.description: A response containing a list of CRSes.

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

AreaOfUseResults.description: Object to hold the list of `AreaOfUse` objects from a search

LateBoundCRSEssenceImpl.description: Late-bound coordinate reference system, i.e. a CRS without a transformation binding to WGS 84

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the LateBoundCRS serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1).

LateBoundCRSRequest.description: Request to get one LateBoundCRS given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence.

EarlyBoundCRSEssenceImpl.description: Early-bound coordinate reference system, i.e. a CRS with a transformation binding to WGS 84

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the EarlyBoundCRS serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1)

EarlyBoundCRSRequest.description: Request to get one EarlyBoundCRS given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the cartographic transform (CT) serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1).

CTRequest.description: Request to get one cartographic transformation given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence.

CRSEssenceImpl.description: Any coordinate reference system essence carrying all possible properties for LateBoundCRSEssence, EarlyBoundCRSEssence and CompoundCRSEssence

CRSRequest.description: Request to get one CRS (any sub-type) given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence. If both are provided, essence takes precedence

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the CompoundCT serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1).

CompoundCTRequest.description: Request to get one CompoundCT given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence.

CompoundCRSEssenceImpl.description: Compound coordinate reference system aggregating a horizontal to a vertical CRS

persistableReference.description: The persistable reference string, either the essence of the CompoundCRS serialized into a JSON string or an encoded string (version 1)

CompoundCRSRequest.description: Request to get one CompoundCRS given its 'persistableReference' (serialized essence) or 'essence' structure. Only one, persistableReference or essence must be provided. If both are provided, essence takes precedence.

persistableReference.description: persistable reference string as passed through the request

AreaOfUseRequest.description: Request to get area of use

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

SingleCTResults.description: A response containing a list of single cartographic transformations.

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

EarlyBoundCRSResults.description: A response containing a list of early-bound CRSes.

offset.description: The offset of the first item in the list of all AreaOfUse. It is optional and is 0 by default.

count.description: The maximum number of the AreaOfUse returned. It is optional and is 100 by default.

totalCount.description: The mode of return: 'persistable_reference' (default) string or 'essence' structure or both 'persistable_reference_essence'.

CompoundCTResults.description: A response containing a list of compound cartographic transformations.
